scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,IA,WEB -c cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8001 --app-dir ai-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n API,IA,WEB -c cyan,yellow,green "npm start --prefix backend" "uvicorn main:app --port 8001 --app-dir ai-service" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
